location: Guaranteed drop from the Troll Knight patrolling the gardens below the Manor Upper Level Site of Grace in Caria Manor, Liurnia of the Lakes.
tactics: From the Manor Upper Level grace, head outside and down the stairs into the gardens, then go north and west toward a stairwell where the Troll Knight patrols.
It's large and slow but hits very hard — bait its telegraphed overhead swings and punish the long recovery afterward.
Two Spectral Troll Knights guarding the path to the Four Belfries can also drop this sword, but only at a low chance, so the Caria Manor troll is the reliable source.
Don't push further up the same staircases while distracted — that route leads to the Royal Knight Loretta boss arena, a separate and much harder fight.
lore: A greatsword set with a shard of blue glintstone, issued to the trolls bound into Caria's service after Queen Rennala called in an old oath, treating the beasts as true knights of her court.

builds.name: Quality/Int Hybrid Colossal
builds.why: Strength and Dexterity scale almost identically here, with a meaningful Intelligence contribution feeding both its magic damage split and the shouted Troll's Roar skill.
